design_philosophy: A sophisticated, professional, and elegant Property Management ERP designed specifically to impress executive leadership. The UI rejects the 'dark-tech-bro' aesthetic in favor of a bright, cashmere-toned layout accented with deep forest green and champagne gold. It leverages generous spacing, refined typography, and subtle component borders to communicate trust, high value, and operational clarity.

buttons.primary: bg-[#203A2B] text-white hover:bg-[#2A4C38] transition-colors rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-body font-medium
buttons.secondary: bg-[#F3EFEA] text-[#203A2B] hover:bg-[#E8E2D9] transition-colors rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-body font-medium
buttons.outline: border border-[#E8E2D9] text-[#1A1C1A] hover:border-[#CFA15A] hover:text-[#CFA15A] transition-colors rounded-lg

tables.header: bg-[#FDFBF7] text-[#7A756C] font-medium uppercase tracking-wider text-xs py-4

navigation.topbar: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#E8E2D9] sticky top-0 z-50

key_visual_elements.ai_command_centre: Position 'Sahayak' AI as a floating crystal orb widget or an elegant slide-out panel, using the crystal image as its core visual. Emphasize soft glowing hover states and clean conversational UI.
key_visual_elements.property_portfolio: Display properties using high-quality imagery with generous aspect ratios (e.g., 4:3 or 16:9). Use bento-grid style cards with elegant typography overlaid or cleanly placed below.
key_visual_elements.kpi_metrics: Use large Cormorant Garamond font for big numbers. Add subtle sparkline charts (recharts) with Champagne Gold strokes.
key_visual_elements.motion: Use smooth, deliberate transitions. Fade-ins with slight upward translations (10px) for cards on load.

hero_background.description: Abstract wavy pattern in champagne gold. Use for login page background or subtle hero header texture.

ai_sahayak_avatar.description: A spherical glass crystal ball with warm lighting. Use as the avatar/icon for Sahayak AI.

chairman_avatar.description: Smiling mature businesswoman. Use as the logged-in user avatar (Female Chairman).

property_1.description: Modern luxury lobby. Use in property portfolio cards.

property_2.description: Modern spiral staircase. Use in property portfolio cards.

property_3.description: Luxurious marble interior. Use in property portfolio cards.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the light theme. DO NOT use standard dark mode.
Use the specific images provided in the media section for user avatar, AI bot, and property placeholders. Do not use generic dummy images.
Implement typography exactly as specified: Cormorant Garamond for headings/KPIs to add feminine elegance and authority, and Outfit for the dense UI text to maintain readability.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, links, and forms.
Do not use heavy box shadows or thick borders on cards. Use the subtle borders and 4px shadows defined.
For the 'Sahayak' AI Command Centre, use a slide-out panel (Sheet component from shadcn) triggered by a floating action button showing the crystal image.
Integrate the primary color (#203A2B) mainly for important interactions and CTAs to keep the interface light and breathable.
Use standard Shadcn components (Card, Button, Table, Sheet, Select, Tabs) but override their Tailwind classes to match this elegant JSON config.
